zh.lifeSummary: 當Laurence Abernethy 1st Lord Saltoun of Abernethy於1403年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安武坡 堂 本 薩爾圖時，他的父親Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun18歲，母親Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick19歲。他和Lady Margaret Stewart - Baroness Campbell至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1461年3月13日在英國蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Abernethy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Abernathy
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Abernethy in southeastern Perthshire. The placename is of Pictish origin, meaning ‘mouth of the river Nethy’.

History: This was the name of a cadet branch of MacDuff earls of Fife and one of the surnames of the Scots who settled in northern Ireland during the ‘plantation’ in the 17th century, and it was brought to the US as the name of a Southern plantation owner (in a different sense of the word ‘plantation’).

nameMeanings.name: Laurence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French form of Latin Laurentius ‘man from Laurentum’. Laurentum was a town in Latium, which may have got its name from Latin laurus ‘laurel’, although it is more probably of pre-Roman origin. The given name was moderately popular in the Middle Ages (when it was used for girls as well as boys), under the influence of a 3rd-century saint who was one of the seven deacons of Rome. He was martyred in 258 . The legend is that, having been required to hand over the Church's treasures to the civil authorities, he assembled the poor and sick and presented them. For this act of Christian defiance, he was roasted to death on a gridiron. In England the name is also associated with St Laurence of Canterbury ( d. 619 ). A more recent influence has been the actor Sir Laurence Olivier ( 1907–89 ). See also Lawrence .

en.lifeSummary: When Laurence Abernethy 1st Lord Saltoun of Abernethy was born in 1403, in Upper Town of Saltoun, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun, was 18 and his mother, Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick, was 19. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Lady Margaret Stewart - Baroness Campbell. He died on 13 March 1461, in Haddingtonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

ko.Saltoun, East Lothian, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 하딩토실르 업퍼 타운 프 살토우
ko.Saltoun, Haddington, East Lothian, Scotl: 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 업퍼 타운 프 살토우
ko.lifeSummary: Laurence Abernethy 1st Lord Saltoun of Abernethy(이)가 1403년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 업퍼 타운 프 살토우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Lady Margaret Stewart - Baroness Campbell(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1461년 3월 13일 영국 스코틀랜드 하딩토실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Laurence Abernethy 1st Lord Saltoun of Abernethy родился в 1403 г. в местности уппир тоун оф салтоун, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick, 19. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Lady Margaret Stewart - Baroness Campbell. Он умер 13 марта 1461 г. в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.
